post.description: Creates a JWT MCP access token for the project. If threadId is provided, the token will be bound to that thread. If threadId is omitted, a sessionless token will be created using the provided contextKey (or from Bearer token if not provided). Sessionless tokens can only access resources and prompts, not session-specific features. The token expires in 15 minutes and can be used as a bearer token.

400.description: Bad request - invalid authentication context or API key

404.description: Thread not found or does not belong to project

post.description: Exchanges an OAuth subject token for a Tambo access token following RFC 6749 and RFC 8693 specifications. Accepts form-encoded data and validates the subject token based on project OAuth validation settings.

400.description: Bad request - invalid grant type or missing parameters

parameters.name: contextKey
parameters.description: Unique user identifier for the thread

post.description: Sets a thread's generation stage to CANCELLED

parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Unique user identifier for the thread

post.description: Upload an audio file and get its transcription. Supports MP3, WAV, MP4, MPEG, MPGA, M4A, and WEBM formats. Maximum file size is 25 MB.
Triggered when a new user signs up via Supabase Auth. Requires webhook secret for authentication.

parameters.name: x-webhook-secret
parameters.description: Shared secret for webhook authentication

parameters.name: x-webhook-source
parameters.description: Source identifier for the webhook

post.summary: Handle new user signup webhook from Supabase

post.description: Returns a presigned URL that allows direct file upload to S3. The client should PUT the file directly to the returned uploadUrl.

400.description: Invalid request (missing contentType or size, or size exceeds 10MB)

post.summary: Get a presigned URL for direct S3 upload

get.description: List all threads for the authenticated project. Supports cursor-based pagination and filtering by user key.

parameters.description: Maximum number of threads to return

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination

parameters.name: userKey
parameters.description: Filter by user key

post.description: Create a new empty thread. Note: initialMessages is not supported yet; create the thread first, then add messages via runs/message endpoints.

post.description: Creates a new thread and immediately starts a streaming run. Returns an SSE stream of AG-UI events.

200.description: SSE stream of AG-UI events. Each event is sent as 'data: <json>\n\n' where <json> is a BaseEvent object.

post.description: Starts a streaming run on an existing thread. Returns an SSE stream of AG-UI events.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Thread ID

200.description: SSE stream of AG-UI events. Each event is sent as 'data: <json>\n\n' where <json> is a BaseEvent object.

delete.description: Explicitly cancel a running run. Note: closing the SSE connection also cancels the run.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Thread ID

parameters.name: runId
parameters.description: Run ID

parameters.name: userKey
parameters.description: Identifier for a user in your system. Required if no bearer token is provided.

post.description: Update the state of a component in a thread. Supports both full replacement and JSON Patch operations. Thread must not have an active run.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Thread ID

parameters.name: componentId
parameters.description: Component ID

400.description: Invalid request (missing state/patch, or invalid patch)

409.description: Cannot update state while run is active

post.description: Generate AI-powered suggestions for the next action based on the thread context. Suggestions are persisted and can be retrieved later via the list endpoint. Calling this endpoint replaces any existing suggestions for the message.

parameters.name: threadId
parameters.description: Thread ID

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Message ID

threadId.description: Thread ID for the MCP access token. If provided, the token will be bound to this thread. If omitted, a sessionless token will be created.

contextKey.description: Context key for sessionless MCP access tokens. If not provided, will be extracted from Bearer token.

mcpAccessToken.description: JWT MCP access token to be used as bearer token. Only included when MCP servers are configured for the project.

expiresAt.description: Expiration time of the token in milliseconds since epoch. Only included when mcpAccessToken is present.

hasSession.description: Whether the token is bound to a specific thread session. Only included when mcpAccessToken is present.

subject_token.description: OAuth subject token from an OAuth provider (e.g., Google, Microsoft)

subject_token_type.description: Type of the subject token - should be 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:access_token' or 'urn:ietf:params:oauth:token-type:id_token'

access_token.description: JWT access token signed by Tambo with projectId as issuer

contextKey.description: Unique user identifier for the thread

tool_call_id.description: The unique id of the tool call, no longer used.

parameters.description: The parameters of the function to call.

toolName.description: The name of the function to call.

uri.description: URI identifying the resource (e.g., file://, https://, s3://)

blob.description: Base64-encoded blob data (alternative to uri or text)

annotations.description: Annotations for additional metadata (MCP-specific). Can include audience, priority, or custom properties.

resource.description: Resource content (when type is 'resource'). Supports MCP Resources with URI, text, or blob data.

toolCallRequest.description: The tool call request. This is filled in whether the tool call is a server-side or client-side tool call.

toolCallId.description: The unique id of the tool call. This is filled in whether the tool call is a server-side or client-side tool call.

parentMessageId.description:
The id of the parent message, if the message was created during the 
generation of another message, such as during an agent call, MCP Elicitation, or MCP Sample

reasoning.description: Reasoning text from the LLM, if the model supports it.

toolCallRequest.description: The tool call request. This is filled in only if the tool call is a client-side tool call.

tool_call_id.description: The unique id of the tool call. This is filled in only if the tool call is a client-side tool call.

actionType.description: Deprecated: use the role and the presence of tool calls to determine the action type

isCancelled.description: Whether the message has been cancelled

additionalContext.description: Additional context to provide to the AI beyond the user query, such as the info about the current page the user is visiting.

type.description: A URI reference that identifies the problem type

status.description: The HTTP status code for this occurrence of the problem

title.description: A short, human-readable summary of the problem type

detail.description: A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the problem
detail.example: Message with ID 'msg_123456789' was not found

instance.description: A URI reference that identifies the specific occurrence of the problem

code.description: An API specific error code aiding the provider team understand the error

errors.description: An array of error details to accompany a problem details response

details.description: Additional error details specific to this occurrence

reasoning.description: Reasoning text from the LLM, if the model supports it.

actionType.description: No longer used - instead set role and the tool call information

isCancelled.description: Whether the message has been cancelled

toolResponse.description: @deprecated Put the response in the content instead

componentState.description: The initial state of the component

additionalContext.description: Additional context to provide to the AI beyond the user query, such as the info about the current page the user is visiting.

messageId.description: ID of the message this suggestion is for

title.description: Short title or summary of the suggestion

detailedSuggestion.example: Add try-catch block to handle potential API errors

description.description: Detailed explanation of the suggestion (alias for detailedSuggestion)
description.example: Add try-catch block to handle potential API errors

maxCalls.description: Maximum number of times this tool can be called in a single thread execution.Overrides project-level maxToolCalls setting for this specific tool.

props.description: JSON Schema for the component's props

maxSuggestions.description: Maximum number of suggestions to generate

availableComponents.description: Available components that can be used with this suggestion

initialMessages.description: Initial messages to include when creating a new thread

statusMessage.description: Status message for the generation stage

file.description: Audio file to transcribe (MP3, WAV, MP4, MPEG, MPGA, M4A, or WEBM)

contentType.description: The MIME type of the file

runStatus.description: Current run status: idle (no run), waiting (run started, awaiting content), streaming (receiving content)

lastRunCancelled.description: Whether the last run was cancelled

lastRunError.description: Error information from the last run

pendingToolCallIds.description: Tool call IDs awaiting client-side results. If non-empty, next run must provide tool_result content with previousRunId set.

lastCompletedRunId.description: ID of the last completed run. Required as previousRunId when continuing after tool calls.

updatedAt.description: When the thread was last updated (ISO 8601)

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results
